---
title: "Capacity Doubling"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
  pdf:
    fig-width: 6
    fig-height: 5
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r setup}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.width = 6, fig.height = 5, dpi = 150)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-capacity-vs-threshold
#| warning: false
#| message: false
# 1. NZE hydropower capacity in 2019 and 2050 (GW → MW)
nze <- read_csv(here("data/NZE2021_AnnexA.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

capacity <- nze %>%
  filter(
    Product == "Hydro",
    Flow == "Installed total power capacity",
    Unit == "GW",
    Year %in% c(2019, 2050)
  ) %>%
  select(Year, Hydro_GW = Value) %>%
  mutate(Hydro_MW = Hydro_GW * 1000)

# 2. Li & He-style shares above/below 80 kg CO2e/MWh (existing vs future dams)
shares <- read_csv(here("data/share_failing_80kg.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

# 3. Map NZE years → which share to use (existing vs future)
capacity_split <- capacity %>%
  mutate(group = if_else(Year == 2019, "Existing dams", "Future dams")) %>%
  left_join(shares, by = "group") %>%
  mutate(
    frac_above = pct_above_80 / 100,
    frac_below = pct_below_80 / 100,
    MW_above   = Hydro_MW * frac_above,
    MW_below   = Hydro_MW * frac_below
  ) %>%
  select(Year, MW_above, MW_below) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("MW_"),
    names_to = "segment",
    values_to = "MW"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    segment = if_else(segment == "MW_above",
                      "Above 80 kg CO2e/MWh",
                      "Below 80 kg CO2e/MWh"),
    Year = factor(Year)
  )

# 4. Stacked bar: total capacity, split by above/below 80 kg CO2e/MWh
p_capacity_threshold <- ggplot(capacity_split, aes(x = Year, y = MW, fill = segment)) +
  geom_col(color = "#222222") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Below 80 kg CO2e/MWh" = "#993404",
      "Above 80 kg CO2e/MWh" = "#FFCA5C"
    ),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Installed hydropower capacity (MW)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

p_capacity_threshold

ggsave(
  filename = here("images", "capacity_vs_threshold.pdf"),
  plot = p_capacity_threshold,
  device = cairo_pdf,
  width = 6,
  height = 5,
  units = "in",
  bg = "transparent"
)
```
